word: H3624 - כֶּלַח - kelach - keh'-lakh - Full age

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלח

Transliteration: kelach

Phonetic: keh'-lakh

BDB Definition:

  1. full strength, firm or rugged strength, vigour

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be complete

TWOT entry: 984a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
